high_vulns.title: Next.js has a Denial of Service with Server Components (GHSA-q4gf-8mx6-v5v3) — related to CVE-2025-55182 / CVE-2025-66478 RCE chain
high_vulns.note: Fixing requires major version upgrade (15.5.14 → 16.2.4) with breaking async API changes

high_vulns.title: Multiple ReDoS vulnerabilities (GHSA-3ppc-4f35-3m26, GHSA-7r86-cg39-jmmj, GHSA-23c5-xmqv-rm74): repeated wildcards, GLOBSTAR segments, nested extglobs
ReDoS and DoS via backtracking regexps and sequential optional groups (GHSA-9wv6-86v2-598j, GHSA-j3q9-mxjg-w52f)
Path traversal vulnerabilities: hardlink target escape via symlink chain, drive-relative linkpath (GHSA-83g3-92jg-28cx, GHSA-qffp-2rhf-9h96, GHSA-9ppj-qmqm-q256)

Multiple: unbounded memory in WebSocket permessage-deflate decompression (GHSA-vrm6-8vpv-qv8q), unhandled exception in WebSocket client (GHSA-v9p9-hfj2-hcw8), HTTP request/response smuggling (GHSA-2mjp-6q6p-2qxm)

high_vulns.package: @vercel/* (22 packages: backends, build-utils, cervel, elysia, express, fastify, fun, gatsby-plugin-vercel-builder, h3, hono, and 12 more)
high_vulns.title: Multiple @vercel/* packages with high severity vulns — likely inherited from minimatch/path-to-regexp/tar/undici transitively
high_vulns.note: Run npm audit fix to resolve most; major version bumps (@vercel/analytics 1→2, @vercel/speed-insights 1→2, vercel CLI 50→52) may be needed for full resolution

high_vulns.title: Next.js DoS with Server Components (GHSA-q4gf-8mx6-v5v3)
high_vulns.note: npm audit fix should resolve; major version upgrade may be needed

high_vulns.title: Prototype Pollution via parse() in NodeJS flatted (GHSA-rf6f-7fwh-wjgh)
Next.js DoS with Server Components (GHSA-q4gf-8mx6-v5v3)
high_vulns.note: Currently on 16.x; patch to 16.2.4 should fix

high_vulns.title: Arbitrary File Read via Vite Dev Server WebSocket (GHSA-p9ff-h696-f583); server.fs.deny bypass via queries (GHSA-v2wj-q39q-566r)
ReDoS via backtracking regexps and sequential optional groups (GHSA-9wv6-86v2-598j, GHSA-j3q9-mxjg-w52f)

prioritized_fixes.rationale: CVE-2025-55182 (CVSS 10.0) is actively exploited in the wild. GHSA-q4gf-8mx6-v5v3 DoS affects all versions >=9.3.4-canary.0. the-squeeze/Career-Portfolio/orbit-dashboard require a 15→16 major upgrade with async API refactoring.

prioritized_fixes.action: Run `npm audit fix` in texas-elections to patch minimatch, path-to-regexp, tar, undici, @vercel/* transitive vulns (22 high)
prioritized_fixes.rationale: 22 high-severity vulnerabilities, most auto-fixable. ReDoS and path traversal are exploitable in server contexts.
Vite dev server arbitrary file read (GHSA-p9ff-h696-f583) is high severity; flatted prototype pollution (GHSA-rf6f-7fwh-wjgh) affects server-side parsing.

prioritized_fixes.action: Plan Next.js 15→16 migration for the-squeeze (also gets: React 19.2.5, Tailwind v4 migration, TypeScript 6)
prioritized_fixes.rationale: On oldest Next.js (15.5.14) and Tailwind v3 — two major version generations behind. These are interconnected upgrades best done together with careful testing.
